objective: Reconcile ASC-Evaluator's knowledge-repo code-governance exemption with its existing Governance Gate workflow and close any stale active exception state.
scope_boundary: Governance repo documentation, exception register, planning, validation, closeout, and generated Stage 6 evidence only.
Read-only inspection of ASC-Evaluator workflow and GitHub Actions status.
No downstream ASC-Evaluator writes unless live validation proves the workflow remains incompatible.
out_of_scope: Changing ASC-Evaluator product or knowledge artifacts.
Changing ASC-Evaluator repository classification or branch rulesets.
Cleaning unrelated dirty files in shared checkouts.
research_summary: ASC-Evaluator currently has `.github/workflows/governance.yml` calling the reusable hldpro-governance governance-check workflow, plus the required docs stubs under `docs/`. The latest default-branch Governance Gate run on `master` succeeded for head `4d7ecdb3313c1aa9b586bf2b8ffd21caa50174a6`, so no downstream workflow edit is needed. Governance must update `SOM-EXEMPT-ASC-001` and close stale blocker `SOM-ASC-CI-001`.

sprints.name: Reconcile Exception State
sprints.goal: Make governance exception records match current ASC-Evaluator workflow reality.
tasks: Inspect ASC-Evaluator workflow and latest default-branch Governance Gate run.
Clarify `SOM-EXEMPT-ASC-001` as code-governance-only exemption compatible with a minimal docs gate.
Mark `SOM-ASC-CI-001` closed with live run evidence.
acceptance_criteria: Latest default-branch Governance Gate success is recorded.
No downstream edit is made when the current workflow is compatible.

specialist_reviews.focus: Determine whether ASC-Evaluator's workflow is currently compatible with the exemption.
specialist_reviews.summary: Live ASC-Evaluator Governance Gate on master is green; governance docs are stale.

alternate_model_review.summary: No HITL is requested; deterministic GitHub Actions evidence and Local CI Gate constrain this documentation-only reconciliation. A read-only subagent review should be used before final publication if needed.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Codex may update #176 planning, exception, validation, closeout, progress/backlog mirrors, and generated Stage 6 evidence only.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Update exception register and evidence artifacts, then run local and GitHub gates.

material_deviation_rules: If ASC-Evaluator Governance Gate is failing again, do not close the exception without a downstream fix or issue-backed deferral.
If reusable governance workflow code changes appear necessary, create a separate issue before editing code.
If branch/ruleset changes appear necessary, route them through the org governance ruleset issue path.
approved_by: operator instruction: follow repo rules and loop through PDCAR, GH epic, ACs, e2e testing as final AC, no HITL
